notes: Stealth-detection and electronic-warfare specialist base — the map's sole example of its kind. Its exclusive production building fields a cloaked heavy vehicle and a non-combat electronic-warfare troop; a shared infantry-training building gives it its own foot-soldier roster too. Comes with a permanent, map-wide detection structure found nowhere else, so its vision bonus can never be duplicated by building more than one. Its specialty defense applies an electronic disruption effect on hit.
